prompt:
Modern minimalist 1:1 hyper-realistic lifestyle photograph. NO PEOPLE, NO hands. Subtle product-color theming (soft teal/cyan glow + gold + warm cream tones echoing the jar's brand palette).

SCENE: a clean modern wood windowsill — warm-cream painted wood window-bench / sill, soft TEAL-CYAN-tinted morning sky visible through the tall window (subtle brand-color cue in the sky tone), sheer linen curtains drawn aside. The Dialed Sea Moss Gummies jar (matching the provided reference image — black plastic, teal/cyan + gold/yellow accents, GOLD LID, front label fully legible) sits naturally CENTERED on the windowsill. NO additional prop besides the jar — just the window-light wash.

ANGLE: a GROUND-LEVEL LOW ANGLE looking UP and slightly across — the camera is positioned below the windowsill height looking up at the jar so the jar appears slightly monumental against the bright window. NOT head-on at eye-level — low-angle dramatic upward perspective.

LIGHTING: bright clean natural daylight streaming through the tall window directly behind the jar, the sheer linen curtain diffusing it softly. A soft teal-tinted ambient bounce from the morning sky outside. The jar is back-lit + side-lit — a clean rim-light wraps the jar's edges from the bright window, a soft front-fill bounces from below to reveal the label. Specular highlight on the jar's curved glossy black plastic.

FRAMING: balanced minimalist arrangement with intentional negative space — the jar sits as the clean focal anchor on the sill, the bright window dominates the upper portion of the frame.

BACKGROUND: bright tall window with sheer linen curtain drawn aside, a hint of teal-tinted morning sky outside, soft-focus suggestion of green foliage through the window. Bright airy real-photograph feel.

STYLE: hyper-realistic photography, 35mm look, f/2.8 shallow depth, simple modern clean composition with subtle brand-color cues in the sky/light. NO AI artifacts, NO text overlays, NO graphic elements, NO callouts.
